programs.title: Hey Duggee
programs.desc: Duggee and the squirrels take their teddy bears out for a picnic. But hang on - who does that HUGE teddy belong to? Oh! That's not a teddy, it's Beryl and she's a real bear! She wants to join in the fun too!

programs.title: Kangaroo Beach
programs.desc: Pounce On Patrol: Wearing Bondi's cap, Pounce thinks he's chief lifeguard - but when Gemma and Neville need rescuing from a whale encounter, should he jump in, or alert a real lifeguard?

programs.title: Fireman Sam
programs.desc: The Pontypandy Pioneers are tasked with making a simple cup of tea to earn a badge and a new Pioneer Vest, but Peter and Mandy misinterpret the instructions and, in their attempt to make a cup of tea from scratch, accidentally start a forest fire!

programs.title: Peter Rabbit
programs.sub_title: The Tale of the Hero Rabbit
programs.desc: When a band of desperate mice mistake Benjamin for a hero and enlist him to retrieve their stolen peas, Benjamin gets more than he bargained for.

programs.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programs.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger are Monster Foodies! They get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making a food that starts with the letter C.

programs.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programs.desc: When Daniel receives a gift from Grandpere, he wants more. Mom Tiger tells him that instead of thinking of what he doesn't have, he can think about what he does have. Daniel stops to appreciate his gift and loves it.
